## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu team meeting to share personal highlights and discuss recent marketing successes, particularly the Voice Agent API launch and workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Voice Agent API launch saw significant success: 31,000 web sessions (44% increase), 1,364 waitlist sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Workshop performance: 92% show rate, $32,000 in ticket sales, demonstrating high value and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Team ending Q3 on a high note, with events and announcements proving to be major drivers for success](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

## Topics

  - [Marcel: Birthday celebration with Brazilian barbecue](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

  - [Patricia: 15th wedding anniversary](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Sam: Moving to New York and welcoming Delano as new marketing operations contractor](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Josh: Preparing for Austin City Limits Music Festival](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Jordan: Upcoming trip to Milan and the Alps; access to Health 2024 attendee list](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Jose: Trip to Orange County, potential Disneyland visit; new demos from writer Andy](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Demetrios: Enjoying last days of summer in Greece](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Shadi: Upcoming Mexico trip; hitting sales targets and potential $1M Twilio deal](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Kavishka: Booking Thailand trip; gradual improvements in AI app traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Anoop: Considering property in Treasure Island; productive offsite discussions](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Voice Agent API Launch Success

  - [Web traffic: 31,000 sessions in first two days (44% increase from Aura preview)](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Waitlist sign-ups: Over 1,364 within a week](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Press coverage: Similar to Aura launch, building brand recognition](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Demo challenges: Some downtime due to high demand, team responded quickly](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

### Workshop Performance

  - [92% show rate, unusually high for webinars](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [$32,000 in ticket sales, demonstrating willingness to pay for valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [High engagement: Many questions in chat, Q\&A, and dedicated Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Areas for improvement: More internal support needed, demo stability issues](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)

### Marketing Strategy Insights

  - [Successful pairing of announcement and workshop events](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Paid workshops proving effective for lead generation and building trust](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Emphasis on founder-led, technical content builds credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Events and announcements confirmed as major drivers for success](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop strategy to convert waitlist sign-ups into paying customers](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Explore opportunities for more paid workshops and educational content](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

  - [Prepare for upcoming all-hands meeting and "Shoppers Everywhere" event on October 4th](https://fathom.video/share/Exiz2zo4pMwt4uNE6ckcngur9ruEN6EX?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
